caption: A woman with blonde-highlighted hair tied back in a bun wears black headphones and a black t-shirt featuring a circular white logo. She is seated in a studio setting, appearing emotional with a sad or crying expression, her eyes squinted and mouth slightly downturned. In front of her is a professional black microphone. The background includes a light-colored wall and a black screen displaying the word "Johnson" in red text, with "Employee Only" visible in small white text above it. To the right, a yellow vertical stripe separates the wall from a black area featuring a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" in red and white text, accompanied by a small graphic and the phrase "By: 11 Logo Studio." Another smaller logo says "PODCAST" beneath "BOSS TALK 101." Across the frames, the woman remains in a similar position, with subtle shifts in her facial expression as she continues to look distressed.
